title: Crypto Dashboard
description: A real-time cryptocurrency tracking dashboard featuring interactive charts, portfolio tracking, and price alerts via WebSocket.

title: E-Commerce Experience
description: A headless e-commerce store with seamless cart management, mock Stripe integration, and a modern, fast user interface.

title: Task Manager Pro
description: A Kanban-style productivity application for teams with drag-and-drop mechanics, role-based access, and local storage fallback.
